title: Industrial ReZolution
description: An industrial mod made for Fabric and fixed for Fabric Loader 0.15.x!
body:
![Header Image](https://i.imgur.com/E5YAMs0.png)

## The developer has resumed development on his mod as is apparent from his GitHub. As soon as he publishes a functional build to Modrinth, this mod will be archived, as I do not intend nor have any interest in taking over development of this mod, as my coding skills are limited and I just barely managed to make the mod work for newer versions of Fabric Loader. As such, I advise you to check the original mod page frequently, to then replace this mod with the original one it was forked from.

This release of the mod is a Hotfix that I created which allows players to use the mod without issues on the latest version of Fabric Loader! (0.15.x)

I am _**NOT**_ the owner nor author of this mod. However, since the developer hasn't uploaded a fix or update in months that addresses the well known issue with Fabric Loader versions from 0.15.x or above, I decided to take upon myself the job of fixing this mod to the best of my abilities. This mod **_WILL_** get taken down upon the request of the developer or when the developer pushes a fixed build himself.

Please note: If you use any mod that depends on Industrial Revolution, it should in theory be fully compatible with this Hotfix release. Don't let the name deter you, internal references and strings have not been altered, merely the naming of the mod.

This mod requires Fabric API and Fabric Language Kotlin

You can find the original mod & description here: [Industrial Revolution](https://modrinth.com/mod/industrial-revolution)
